_about: Retrieval benchmark (Task 3.2). Each query has a gold set of known-relevant papers identified by arXiv id (primary match key) and title (fallback). SEED set of 6 ML queries — expand toward 30-50 by mining survey-paper reference lists. Gold papers are landmark works for each topic.
